target_price_history.note: Raised from $270 post FY26Q4 beat; shifted to 28x FY28 EPS from 30x in May preview

key_thesis: NVDA是全球唯一拥有GPU+CPU+LPU+Networking+Software全栈AI compute platform at scale的公司。$1T+ DC revenue floor(CY2025-2027)不含CPU/LPX/Hopper上行空间。← Citi 30413829
Agentic AI是第三大需求拐点(after generative AI and reasoning)，management targeting 50x token generation growth vs 5x from reasoning alone。推理需求已inflect。← Citi 30394336, Citi 30432569
Vera CPU开辟全新$200B TAM by 2030，FY27指引$20B standalone CPU revenue。Anthropic/OpenAI/Meta/Microsoft为首批客户。CPU:GPU approaching 1:1。← Citi 30432569, Citi 30434725

Custom ASIC share gains gradual not disruptive: merchant GPU share 90%(C2025E)→81%(C2028E)。NVDA retains training+reasoning inference leadership through CUDA moat and annual upgrade cycles。← Citi 30387538, Citi 30429659

Gross margin durability at mid-70s confirmed through multiple product transitions (Blackwell→Rubin)。FY26Q4 GM 75.2% beat, FY27Q1 at 75.0% in-line。Management supply chain pre-negotiation provides cost visibility。← Citi 30408748

forecasts.value: 28x FY28 EPS (shifted from 30x in May 2026 preview)

broker_reports.source: Citi 30408799 (TP raise), Citi 30429659 (TAM model), Citi 30432569 (CPU thesis)
